title: AI Workspace Session Profile
description: A composable session profile that bundles a pack, persona, and optional skills/loops into a single loadable unit.

name.description: Kebab-case profile name (used as filename and .active-profile value).

pack.description: Pack name (without .yaml) to load from packs/ when this profile activates.

persona.description: Persona to activate (must match a file in personas/).

skills.description: Optional list of extra skills to enable for this profile.

loops.description: Optional list of loop names to associate with this profile.
